title: Wilberry - Eco Comforters - Elephant Soft Toy - WB005504
features: Friendly Elephant Wilberry Eco Comforter in a soft grey with soft little trunk and a friendly face. This Elephant appeals to babies and toddlers alike and makes a great companion for story and playtime fun. Soft snuggly body and knotted arms and legs, perfect for little hands and taking with you wherever you go.

Good for baby, good for the planet - these are part of our growing Eco collection made from 100% recycled plastic bottles. These comforters are incredibly soft and finished to the highest standard, with knotted arms and legs for extra detail and sensory play.

The perfect 'first friend' providing comfort and joy. This collection is designed to complement the most popular nursery and playroom themes and look as good on shelves and in nurseries as they do when being played with.
Soft, safe and totally adorable, these encourage fine motor skill development and are able to be used for interaction between adult and baby.
description: Product description The much-anticipated Wilberry Eco Comforters are made from the softest materials tested to the highest possible safety standards, all made from 100% recycled plastic bottles. Suitable from birth with embroidered eyes and traditional comforter style bodies, these delightful Comforters feature some of the most-loved animals and make the ideal gift for babies and toddlers alike. Safety Warning non applicable
